channel.title: All Teams - Release Notes
channel.description: Combined release notes from all teams

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.9.0
item.description:
ScreenCloud

New: Amazon Signage Stick (ASS) dedicated player. Previously ran Amazon Fire OS player on ASS device.

View release notes →

item.title: 1Password - 1Password for Android Beta
item.description:
1Password

All Mac iOS

View release notes →

Scribe

View release notes →

item.title: Scribe - Polish your Scribes in seconds with AI-powered editing
item.description:
Scribe

Loading...

View release notes →

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.7.16
item.description:
ScreenCloud

Rollback release fixing issues introduced in v4.7.12. Released at 50% for Fire OS players alongside v4.6.30.

View release notes →

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.11.2
item.description:
ScreenCloud

New: Support for Amazon’s Remote Device Management (RDM) for Signage Sticks, including:Screen/TV mute and unmute via HDMI-CECScreen/TV power on and off via HDMI-CECDevice rebootScreenshot and full-screen captureDeep cache clearing (player app and Android system cache)Player app restartCPU and GPU...

View release notes →

item.title: 1Password - 1Password for Android
item.description:
1Password

All Mac iOS

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - Why: We want to empower users to create, regardless of their technical skill set or access to complex software. With Gemini Omni, your natural languag
item.description:
Gemini

Why: We want to empower users to create, regardless of their technical skill set or access to complex software. With Gemini Omni, your natural language is the only tool you need to direct, refine, and produce captivating videos.

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - What: Gemini Omni helps you create and edit videos as easily as having a conversation. It’s like Nano Banana for videos. Blend any combination of text
item.description:
Gemini

What: Gemini Omni helps you create and edit videos as easily as having a conversation. It’s like Nano Banana for videos. Blend any combination of text, photos, and video to create high-quality video. You can even drop yourself right into the action by creating a custom AI avatar that looks and...

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - Why: With Gemini Spark, we are transforming Gemini from an AI assistant that answers your questions into one that actually works proactively on your b
item.description:
Gemini

Why: With Gemini Spark, we are transforming Gemini from an AI assistant that answers your questions into one that actually works proactively on your behalf.

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - What: Gemini Spark introduces a whole new way to get things done. It helps you navigate your digital life by working on your tasks on your behalf. Gem
item.description:
Gemini

What: Gemini Spark introduces a whole new way to get things done. It helps you navigate your digital life by working on your tasks on your behalf. Gemini Spark is rolling out today to trusted testers and in Beta to Google AI Ultra subscribers aged 18 and over in the United States in the coming...

View release notes →

item.title: Ad Astra - May 15, 2026
item.description:
Ad Astra
View release notes →

item.title: Canva - New preview APIs are available: Create design merge job and Get design merge job. These APIs let you merge design pages by inserting, moving, or delet
item.description:
Canva

New preview APIs are available: Create design merge job and Get design merge job. These APIs let you merge design pages by inserting, moving, or deleting pages to create a new design or modify an existing one.

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Create design API now supports two new creation modes: copying an existing design using type: design, and creating a design from a brand template
item.description:
Canva

The Create design API now supports two new creation modes: copying an existing design using type: design, and creating a design from a brand template using type: brand_template. Both creation modes are currently a preview feature.

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - Streamlined UI Updates Are Now Live
item.description:
Kuali Build

Our new user interface updates are now live - see the original announcement for a detailed overview of what’s changed. These improvements a...

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - New response fields in Dashboards and Accounts API endpoints
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | New response fields for Zoom Room in Dashboards API endpoints. And new response fields for webinar summary and questions with AI Companion in Accounts API endpoints.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Translator APIs for translation jobs and files and a new Scribe file retrieval API
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added Translator APIs to create and manage translation jobs, translate content, and retrieve translated files. Added a new Scribe API to retrieve processed files from a Scribe job.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Renaming of Zoom Docs
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release, new-feature | Product name update Zoom Dos will now be called Canvas.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Four new APIs, two new webhook events, and new fields in over 10 API endpoints
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Four new APIs, two new webhook events, and new fields in over 10 API endpoints.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - New fields in two API endpoints and the participant-feedback webhook events
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | New fields in two API endpoints and the participant-feedback webhook events.

View release notes →

item.title: Ad Astra - March 27, 2026
item.description:
Ad Astra
View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Workspace Updates Weekly Recap - May 15, 2026
item.description:
Google Workspace

Whiteboarding add-ons now available for Android-based Google Meet hardwareThird-party whiteboarding add-ons for Google Meet, including Figma, Lucidspark, and Miro, will be available for room hardware based on Android. | Learn more about whiteboarding add-ons for Android-based Google Meet...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Android-based all-in-one room devices from Neat and Logitech certified for Google Meet
item.description:
Google Workspace

The Neat Board series (32, 50, and Pro) and the Logitech Rally Board 65 are now certified for Google Meet as the first Android-based all-in-one devices. They package up and deliver a modern Meet experience in stylish form factors ideal for simple deployment in traditional meeting rooms, open...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Whiteboarding add-ons now available for Android-based Google Meet hardware
item.description:
Google Workspace

Third-party whiteboarding add-ons for Google Meet will be available for room hardware based on Android. As all-in-one devices with touchscreens become certified for Meet, users will be able to whiteboard on them to share ideas, brainstorm, and work on projects together in real-time meetings,...

View release notes →

item.title: ChatGPT - File library expands to Free and Go users, with storage management
item.description:
ChatGPT

File library is expanding to Free and Go users, including to users in the European Economic Area (EEA) making it easier to find, reuse, and build on files you upload or create in ChatGPT. You can add recent files from the composer, browse saved files in Library, and ask ChatGPT about files you’ve...

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - New: Secondary Workflows
item.description:
Kuali Build

You can now create and run Secondary Workflows to support processes that happen outside your main submission workflow. This gives you more f...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Expanding language support for refining messages with Gemini in Google Chat
item.description:
Google Workspace

We are expanding the capabilities of Gemini in Google Chat by adding support for several new languages when refining message drafts. In addition to English, users can now use Gemini to polish their messages in French, German, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese, and Spanish. This update allows a...

View release notes →

item.title: Windows - Announcing new Release Preview builds for 14 May 2026
item.description:
Windows

[19 May 2026: Updated build numbers for new releases containing bug fixes - see release notes for details] Hello Windows Insiders, Today we're releasing new builds for Release Preview across our supported versions of Windows 11. Please see the bu The post Announcing new Release Preview builds for...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Expanded options for header images in Google Forms
item.description:
Google Workspace

Form creators now have more options for header images in Google Forms. Previously, creators could only use a pre-selected theme, upload an image, or choose an image from Google Photos. In addition to these options, they can now choose an image from Google Drive or Google Images or use a URL. This...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Improving security posture with default context-aware access for all SAML applications
item.description:
Google Workspace

Administrators can now apply a global context-aware access (CAA) policy to all SAML applications within their organization. This update introduces a default assignment that serves as a universal security baseline, automatically protecting any SAML-based app that does not have a specific policy...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Enhancing the Datadog app for Google Chat
item.description:
Google Workspace

The latest version of the Datadog app for Google Chat allows you to integrate Datadog into your Google Chat workflows more seamlessly and stay on top of critical infrastructure without leaving the flow of team collaboration. Newly added features include: Link previewsCut and paste a widget from a...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Deploying ServiceNow Now Assist Virtual Agent from the Google Workspace Marketplace
item.description:
Google Workspace

Google Workspace customers can now deploy the Now Assist Virtual Agent for Google Chat integration directly from the Google Workspace Marketplace. This update simplifies the deployment process for Workspace and ServiceNow administrators, allowing them to provide employees with centralized access to...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Small businesses can now seamlessly import users from Microsoft to Google Workspace
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re excited to announce the beta release of a new, simplified way for very small and small-sized businesses to import their users from Microsoft to Google Workspace when setting up their Workspace account for the first time.This new feature allows these businesses and educational institutions to...

View release notes →

item.title: Ad Astra - May 8, 2026
item.description:
Ad Astra
View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Create design export job API now supports CSV export using the csv export file type. Only Canva Sheets designs can be exported as CSV.
item.description:
Canva
View release notes →

item.title: Slack - New Slack MCP Server tools released
item.description:
Slack

We've added the following tools to the Slack MCP server:

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Use NotebookLM in your Google Workspace Studio flows
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re integrating NotebookLM into Google Workspace Studio. This enhancement lets you use your existing notebooks as an AI knowledge source for your automations. You can use the new Ask NotebookLM step to generate grounded responses based on the insights, summaries, and research in your...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Workspace Assignments LTI™ and Gemini LTI™ are now available for Moodle
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re expanding the availability of Assignments LTI™ and Gemini LTI™ to include Moodle, joining our existing support for Canvas and Schoology. Gemini LTI™ brings Google AI tools like the Gemini app and NotebookLM directly into third-party Learning Management Systems (LMS), enabling students and...

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - Default View Settings Have Moved to Views
item.description:
Kuali Build

Default View Settings are now managed directly in Views, making it easier to control what users see by default. Previously, admins configure...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Add avatars when you convert presentations to Vids
item.description:
Google Workspace

You can already convert your Google Slides content into Google Vids, and use Gemini to generate scripts, voiceovers, and background music. Now, you can add a spokesperson to your videos using AI avatars when importing content from Slides. Avatars are dynamically inserted throughout the imported...

View release notes →

item.title: macOS - macOS 26.5 (25F71)
item.description:
macOS

View downloadsView release notes

View release notes →

Zoom

Tags: api-release, new-feature | Two new endpoints: usage, and information.

Zoom

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Workspace Updates Weekly Recap - May 8, 2026
item.description:
Google Workspace

Now generally available: Bulk import using client-side encryption and the Drive APIPreviously available in beta, client-side encryption (CSE) customers can now conduct bulk migrations of sensitive files from both cloud and on-premises data sources. | Learn more about how to bulk import using...

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - Interactive Design Lab Improvements Release
item.description:
Kuali Build

We’re excited to share a new set of improvements inspired by our first-ever Interactive Design Lab at Kuali Days 2026. This session brought ...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Improvements To Help Me Write in Gmail
item.description:
Google Workspace

As previously announced, Help me write in Gmail is evolving into an even more helpful partner that can pull in your natural voice and personalized context to get you closer to the perfect draft every time. We’ve added two new personalization enhancements:Topic contextualization: The feature can now...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Workspace Studio available in more languages
item.description:
Google Workspace

Google Workspace Studio has expanded its support to include seven new languages. In addition to English, Workspace Studio now offers full capabilities in:FrenchGermanItalianJapaneseKoreanPortugueseSpanishGetting startedAdmins: There is no admin control for this feature.End users: Try out Google...

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - Coming Soon: Streamlined UI updates - Arriving May 18, 2026
item.description:
Kuali Build

Our new user interface updates launch on May 18, 2026. See the original announcement for a detailed overview of what’s changing and how to p...

View release notes →

Ad Astra

item.title: ClickUp - Release Notes 4.04
item.description:
ClickUp

Gantt Baselines, Brain goes Mobile, ClickUp in ChatGPT, and More!This week's ClickUpdates brings Gantt Baselines to track how your project plans shift over time, the full power of Brain to your mobile device, ClickUp right inside ChatGPT, and more ways to customize how your meetings are captured.✨...

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - New: Smarter Search Results in Document Lists
item.description:
Kuali Build

We’ve improved how search works in document lists to help you find the right records faster. These updates reduce noise and surface the most...

View release notes →

item.description:
PaperCut

Important upgrade information Version 25 includes significant updates, which may introduce breaking changes, new internet connection requirements, and mandatory updates for some optional components.Upgrading from version 24.x? Please review Important points to know about PaperCut MF version...

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - New: View Effective Permissions for Any User
item.description:
Kuali Build

You can now see exactly what permissions a user has—all in one place. The new Effective Permissions tab, located within each user’s record, ...

View release notes →

Windows

(KB 5083725) What’s new in Canary Build 28020.1863 Changes and Improvements g The post Announcing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 28020.1863 (Canary Channel) appeared first on Windows...

Windows

This update is available The post Releasing Windows 11 Builds 26100.8313 and 26200.8313...

Changes in Beta Channel builds and updates are documented in two buckets: new features, and improvements (i The post Announcing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 26220.8271...

Changes in Dev Channel builds and updates are documented in two buckets: new features, and improvements (inc The post Announcing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 26300.8276...

item.title: Gemini - Why: By bringing a native app to Mac, we're cutting down on context switching and giving you a faster, more integrated way to use Gemini alongside the
item.description:
Gemini

Why: By bringing a native app to Mac, we're cutting down on context switching and giving you a faster, more integrated way to use Gemini alongside the tools you use every day.

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - What: We’re introducing the Gemini app for Mac, a native desktop experience built to help you get more done without disrupting your flow. With a simpl
item.description:
Gemini

What: We’re introducing the Gemini app for Mac, a native desktop experience built to help you get more done without disrupting your flow. With a simple keyboard shortcut (Option + Space), you can bring up Gemini alongside any application you're using. You can also seamlessly share your window,...

View release notes →

item.title: Ad Astra - April 10, 2026
item.description:
Ad Astra
View release notes →

Slack

Version 4.0.0 of the developer tools for the Slack platform has arrived with lots of goodies for you!

item.title: ClickUp - Release Notes 4.03
item.description:
ClickUp

Google Drive Automations, Granular Capacity in Workload View, and Smoother Teammate Onboarding!This week's release automates work between ClickUp and Google Drive, provides more detail into team capacity in Workload view, and lets you onboard invitees to teams faster.✨ Automate Workflows between...

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Create design API now supports email in the name field for preset types.
item.description:
Canva
View release notes →

item.title: NinjaOne - Gain Better IT Asset Control and Visibility into Software Licensing With NinjaOne 13.0
item.description:
NinjaOne

NinjaOne’s 13.0 release advances IT asset management (ITAM) capabilities with software license improvements that offer greater cost visibility, usage history for custom licenses, and refined control over permissions and assignments. The platform now includes robust Lost Mode support for managed...

View release notes →

item.title: PaperCut - 25.0.10
item.description:
PaperCut

Important upgrade information Version 25 includes significant updates, which may introduce breaking changes, new internet connection requirements, and mandatory updates for some optional components.Upgrading from version 24.x? Please review Important points to know about PaperCut MF version...

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - PKCE is now generally available!
item.description:
Slack

We are excited to announce support for Proof Key for Code Exchange (PKCE). PKCE is an OAuth security extension that enables developers to build more secure Slack applications on public clients, such as desktop apps and mobile apps, without the need to embed a vulnerable client_secret.

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Assets APIs⁠(opens in a new tab or window) now return an additional metadata property as part of the asset object.
item.description:
Canva
View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Create design export job API now supports two additional email export formats: html_bundle and html_standalone. Use these formats when creating e
item.description:
Canva

The Create design export job API now supports two additional email export formats: html_bundle and html_standalone. Use these formats when creating export jobs for email designs, depending on whether you need bundled assets (html_bundle) or a standalone HTML output (html_standalone).

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Create design autofill job API now supports column_configs for chart data fields, allowing you to define column names and data types separately f
item.description:
Canva

The Create design autofill job API now supports column_configs for chart data fields, allowing you to define column names and data types separately from your data.

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - A new type request parameter has been added to the Create design API. Although this type is shown as required, for backward compatibility, if it isn't
item.description:
Canva

A new type request parameter has been added to the Create design API. Although this type is shown as required, for backward compatibility, if it isn't provided in a request, the request type will be assumed to be type_and_asset.

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - What: Starting today, we are rolling out new switching tools to your Settings page for all consumer accounts. You can now easily import your personal
item.description:
Gemini

What: Starting today, we are rolling out new switching tools to your Settings page for all consumer accounts. You can now easily import your personal context, preferences, and full chat history from other AI apps directly into Gemini. To bring over your memories, simply select the import option in...

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - Why: The most helpful AI assistant is one that understands your preferences and past conversations. Starting over with a new assistant can feel daunti
item.description:
Gemini

Why: The most helpful AI assistant is one that understands your preferences and past conversations. Starting over with a new assistant can feel daunting, so we created these tools to let you quickly get Gemini up to speed on what matters most to you without starting from scratch. By bringing over...

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - What: Starting today, we are rolling out new switching tools to your Settings page for all consumer accounts. You can now easily import your personal
item.description:
Gemini

What: Starting today, we are rolling out new switching tools to your Settings page for all consumer accounts. You can now easily import your personal context, preferences, and full chat history from other AI apps directly into Gemini. To bring over your memories, simply select the import option in...

View release notes →
